overall.description: Cinematic third-person game footage of a cloaked character standing on a windswept rocky beach, gazing toward ancient stone ruins and a bell tower across the shore under a dramatic cloudy sky with warm golden lighting. The scene features high-quality Unreal Engine-style rendering with detailed coastal rock formations and atmospheric depth.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal ruins overlook with stone tower

agents.ego_description: standing still on the rocky beach, facing the distant stone bell tower and ruins across the water

notable_agents.action: seagulls flying in loose formation across the sky above the water

entered.detail: tall stone tower with arched openings and a pointed roof, part of coastal ruins
large natural rock formation with a prominent archway, covered in grass on top
weathered wooden dock or walkway extending along the right side of the beach
calm coastal water with gentle waves lapping at the sandy shore
tall sea stacks rising from the water in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The character stands motionless on a sandy beach facing ancient coastal ruins. A stone bell tower dominates the center distance, framed by a dramatic rocky arch formation on the right and calm ocean waters on the left. Seagulls drift across the partly cloudy sky as warm golden light breaks through the clouds, illuminating the historic stone architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady, atmospheric gaze across a windswept shoreline toward a distant complex of ancient coastal ruins. It begins with a motionless character standing on a sandy beach, facing a landscape where a stone bell tower dominates the horizon. As the camera lingers, the view is framed by a dramatic rocky arch on the right and the calm expanse of the ocean on the left. The scene then opens up to the sky, where seagulls drift through parting clouds as warm golden light breaks through to illuminate the historic stone architecture.
